nasb.text: Abundant food is in the fallow ground of the poor, But it is swept away by injustice.

esv.text: The fallow ground of the poor would yield much food, but it is swept away through injustice.

cnv.text: 窮人的耕地可產大量糧食， 卻因不義都被摧毀了。

ccb.text: 穷人的田地出产丰富， 因不公而被抢掠一空。

csbs.text: 穷人所开垦之地，有许多粮食， 但因不公正的事，被一扫而空。
